title: TACZ Magic Effect
description: Adds a magical hexagram effect when shooting and a rising magic bullet effect when pressing the X key.
body:
![Magic Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3b29a12daddf45c500ce494614f93a07a61006a_0.webp)
![Magic Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20136612c5ec8ad5c572e99f3a123b91191889bf_0.webp)
![Magic Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec04bcbae7ee684261499b82fbb69bbb2623b8b2_0.webp)
功能亮点 / Features
魔法阵射击特效 / Magic Circle Shooting Effect
射击时，在目标位置生成一个 MC 风格魔法阵，带紫色光效。
When firing, a Minecraft-style magical hexagram appears at the target position, emitting vibrant purple glow.
魔法子弹升天 / Magic Bullet Ascend
按下 X 键，触发魔法子弹效果：射出的子弹带有光轨并模拟升天。
Press X key to activate the magic bullet effect: bullets gain glowing trails and simulate ascending flight.
装饰/视觉增强 / Decorative & Visual Enhancement
适用于装饰场景、战斗特效或魔法阵演示。
Suitable for decorative setups, combat visual effects, or magic circle demonstrations.
安装说明 / Installation
将本 MOD .jar 文件放入 mods 文件夹。
Place the MOD .jar file into the mods folder.
确保 TACZ 模组已安装。
Ensure the TACZ mod is installed.
射击时自动加载魔法阵特效。
Magic circle effect automatically loads when firing.
按 X 键 可激活魔法子弹效果。
Press X key to activate the magic bullet effect.
使用示例 / Usage Example
射击：生成魔法阵特效
Fire: Spawns a magical hexagram effect
按 X：魔法子弹升天，带光轨动画
Press X: Magic bullets ascend with glowing trails
